sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: The sky blue dot at (37, 18) turned pink! This is a key finding. So clicking on sky blue dots changes their color to pink. The goal is likely to click all 8 sky blue dots to turn them pink. Let me verify this by checking the current state and then clicking on the remaining dots.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# The sky blue dot at (37,18) turned pink! 
# Goal: click all sky blue dots to turn them pink
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
print("Sky blue dots remaining:")
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'S' and n['pixels'] == 1:
        print(f"  ID={n['id']}, pos={n['boundary']}")
print("\nPink dots (converted):")
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'P' and n['pixels'] == 1:
        print(f"  ID={n['id']}, pos={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
